title: Farmer's Sanctuary
description: A modpack that is purely for chill farming experience, centered around villages.
body:
# Farmer's Sanctuary

## About The Modpack
Farmer's Sanctuary is a modpack that offers a peaceful gameplay with less mining and more farming. The modpack is centered around villages with roads connecting each one. Caves are disabled to focus on what is going on on the surface. No need to worry about missing out on unexplored caves. We hope to give you a peaceful time playing this modpack, far from the complicated side of things. We hope you enjoy the game!
